source_section.title_label_raw: Built Form and Siting Requirements within the LI and HRI Zones Applicability

sections.title_label_raw: Siting Requirements within the LI and HRI Zones Applicability

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements within the LI and HRI Zones Applicability
provisions.text: With the exception of main buildings within a heritage conservation district, any main building erected, constructed, reconstructed, altered, or located, or an addition to any main building, within a LI or HRI zone shall meet the built form and siting requirements of this Chapter. Maximum Building Height

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed
provisions.text: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed the maximum required building height specified on Schedule 15. Minimum Front or Flanking Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 248(1.5) and 248(2), any portion of a

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 248(1.5) and 248(2), any portion of a
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 248(1.5) and 248(2), any portion of a main building, either above or below grade, shall have a minimum required front or flanking setback as specified on Schedule 18. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 248(1.5) and 248(2), any portion of a
provisions.text: If a minimum required front or flanking setback has not been specified on Schedule 18, the minimum required front or flanking setback shall be 3.0 metres. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 248(1.5) and 248(2), any portion of a
provisions.text: The minimum required front or flanking setback shall be 7.5 metres if located across a street from any HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone. Side Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 249(2) and Section 427, the minimum

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 249(2) and Section 427, the minimum
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 249(2) and Section 427, the minimum required side setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 249(2) and Section 427, the minimum
provisions.text: where a lot line abuts a lot, any portion of which, is zoned HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, PCF, or RPK zone, 10.0 metres from the side lot line abutting the lot; or (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 249(2) and Section 427, the minimum
Subject to Subsection 249(2) and Section 427, the minimum
provisions.text: Underground parking structures are not required to have a minimum side setback, providing they do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade in any side yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 249(2) and Section 427, the minimum
provisions.text: There is no maximum required side setback. Rear Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 250(2), the minimum required rear

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 250(2), the minimum required rear
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 250(2), the minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 250(2), the minimum required rear
provisions.text: where a lot line abuts a lot, any portion of which, is zoned HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, PCF, or RPK zone, 10.0 metres from the rear lot line abutting the lot; or (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 250(2), the minimum required rear
Subject to Subsection 250(2), the minimum required rear
provisions.text: Underground parking structures are not required to have a minimum rear setback, providing they do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade in any rear yard. Maximum Lot Coverage

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 251(2), the maximum required lot

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 251(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 251(2), the maximum required lot coverage shall be 80%.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 251(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no greater than 20.0 square metres, shall be exempted from the maximum required lot coverage calculation. Accessory Structures and Shipping Containers

sections.title_label_raw: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the
provisions.text: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter 19.
